title: Closed Lane Roadmap Filter
goal: Prevent closed or done planning lanes from appearing as roadmap promotion candidates in compact summary and autopilot routing.
non_goals: Do not add a new command or report surface.
Do not remove closed lane history from planning state.

intent.outcome: Closed lanes remain durable history but no longer create current roadmap promotion pressure.
intent.constraints: Keep the fix provider-agnostic and limited to planning-state projection/filtering.
intent.latitude: Tighten existing filters and focused tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if closed lanes need a new historical projection surface rather than filtering from current candidates.

execution.next_step: Close #548 after proof and external evidence refresh.
execution.proof: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; ruff checks

invariants: Only current/promotable lanes should influence roadmap promotion readiness.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Keep the package streamlined and cheap by avoiding stale planning pressure after backlog closure.

required_continuation.activation trigger: closed or historical planning records create current execution pressure again

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: The summary/autopilot loop can report satisfaction when only closed lanes remain.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: No historical closed-lane display was added.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The existing compact summary was the right place to catch the issue; no new feature was needed.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Create and ingest improvement issues, then implement them.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Fix the dogfooded stale roadmap routing without adding product residue.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Filter closed planning lanes/candidates before readiness and roadmap projections consume them.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm closed/done lanes no longer count as promotable, while active roadmap lanes still do.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning package projection logic, focused summary tests, and planning closeout evidence
execution_bounds.required validation commands: proof-selected planning package and workspace CLI tests
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any new command, schema, or report surface
execution_bounds.stop before touching: External adapter semantics or GitHub-specific routing

stop_conditions.stop when: Filtering would hide an active/deferred lane.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: Historical closed-lane display requires a new surface.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Focused tests or planning doctor fail.

context_budget.live working set: Issue #548, planning summary projection code, focused tests, and compact summary output.
context_budget.recoverable later: Closed parent lane #530 and child archives.

delegated_judgment.reason: The fix was small, local, and on the critical path.

references.label: Exclude closed lanes from roadmap promotion candidates

invariants: Closed lanes are durable evidence, not current execution pressure.
Provider-specific tracker state stays outside the core projection logic.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Summary roadmap candidate counts should represent promotable current work.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests
cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Closed/done lanes are excluded from roadmap candidates.
Summary readiness becomes narrow-direct-ready when only closed lanes remain.
Autopilot reports satisfied when no active, deferred, or promotable work remains.

execution_run.summary: Added closed-lane filtering for state-backed roadmap lanes/candidates and focused package/root summary tests.

finished_run_review.findings: No follow-up product issue; existing projection surfaces were sufficient.

proof_report.commands: Focused planning package, workspace summary, workspace CLI, and ruff checks passed before closeout.

intent_satisfaction.evidence: Current repo summary reports roadmap lane_count 0, candidate_count 0, execution_readiness narrow-direct-ready, and autopilot satisfied after the fix.

system_intent_alignment.reason: The fix removes stale current-work pressure without adding a new surface.

generated_closeout.summary: #548 is satisfied by filtering closed/done planning lanes and matching candidates out of current roadmap promotion projections.
generated_closeout.validation: Focused package/root summary tests, workspace CLI tests, ruff, summary, and planning doctor.
generated_closeout.residue: Projection logic and tests own the behavior.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Closed durable planning history should not create current promotion pressure.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: A quiet backlog should make the package feel quiet.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: closed or historical records affect current execution pressure again

execution_summary.changed: Filtered closed planning lanes/candidates and added focused regression tests.

signals found: Closed lanes were still counted as roadmap promotion candidates.
signals fixed: Summary/autopilot now treat closed lanes as history rather than current work.
signals dismissed: No new command or surface was needed.

proof_expectations: agentic-workspace summary --format json reports no roadmap promotion pressure when only closed lanes remain.

anti_overfitting_review.reason: The filter uses generic planning maturity/status fields and makes no GitHub, repo, tool, language, or model assumption.

cost_assessment.quality: Current-work projection now matches closed backlog state.
cost_assessment.efficiency: The package exposed the stale-route issue immediately in compact summary.
cost_assessment.cognitive_load: Lower after fix; agents no longer have to ignore stale roadmap promotion advice.
cost_assessment.correct_by_design_assessment: Filtering uses existing structured status/maturity fields instead of post-hoc guidance.
cost_assessment.validation_role: confirmation after one shape fix in the closeout record
